_comment: Move-order ghost preview per-formation geometry (#563): hold Space so the orders overlay is live, select the Spearmen (seed 12345, ~500,300), form Square (O), then right-click to march them. Before the fix, the ghost preview always drew the wide 2:1 line grid (UnitFormation.slots) even for a squared unit; after the fix it reads formation_slots(), so the ghost matches the real square footprint the unit is actually standing in -- compare the live block's shape to the ghost dots at the destination.
